evidence.cancellation_path: Partition Manager Apply uses cancellable elevated helper; this VM gate ran same Optimize-Volume defrag command on disposable media.
evidence.media_type: VirtualBox rotational HDD; FriendlyName=VBOX HARDDISK; Get-PhysicalDisk MediaType=Unspecified

verification_summary: Windows 11 VirtualBox VM SAK-PM-LAB used disposable VBOX HARDDISK 1, created NTFS fixture volume D:, ran Optimize-Volume -Analyze and -Defrag, ran Repair-Volume -Scan, and cleared the disk back to RAW.
operator_notes: Gate intentionally targets VirtualBox rotational data disk only; SSD/NVMe media is rejected before execution.
